[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。
僅在使用者明確要求傳檔時加；產生/儲存檔案不構成傳檔意圖，回報路徑即可。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）
- researcher（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/researcher）
- general（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/general）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`）
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Environment — machine-specific paths the bridge resolved for this session]
Skills and notes that need filesystem paths should reference these variables,
not hard-coded values. This lets the same SKILL.md work on multiple machines.
- MEMORY_DIR=G:\AI\AIMemory
- SKILL_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\skills
- AGENT_CONFIG_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude
- USER_ID=509424983
Conventions: sessions are under ${MEMORY_DIR}/sessions/, archived under
${MEMORY_DIR}/oldSessions/, master fact log at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts-${USER_ID}.md,
topic shards at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts_Topic/${USER_ID}/<topic>.md.
Agent-wide config files (agent configs) live under
${AGENT_CONFIG_DIR}/.
Specialist 歷史產出存在 ${MEMORY_DIR}/artifacts/（結構化 JSON），需要時用 read tool 查閱。
[End environment]

[Project context — AI.md layered loading]
工作目錄可能有 `AI.md` 檔案記錄該項目/目錄的上下文要點。
規則：讀到或修改某目錄的檔案時，檢查該目錄及上層（最多 3 層）有無 AI.md。
有就用 read tool 讀取作為工作上下文。同 session 同一個 AI.md 只需讀一次。
多層都有時全部讀（根先子後）。AI.md ≤2000 字，寫架構/慣例/踩坑/測試指引。
主動寫入：在某目錄新增≥3檔案、做架構性改動、或踩坑修復時，主動建立/更新 AI.md。
SPEC：任務≥3工項且跨≥2檔案時先開 SPEC.md；完成工項標 [x]；session 結束前更新進度。
預設行為是寫，不是不寫。詳見 POLICIES/proactive-write-policy.md。
CodeGraph：首次對某專案做修改或追呼叫鏈時，用 codegraph_status(projectPath) 檢查該專案有無索引。
有索引→優先用 codegraph_context/trace/impact 而非手動 grep；改函式簽名前必須先 codegraph_impact。
無索引→回報使用者，建議建立。已知有索引的專案以 codegraph_status 回傳為準。
[End project context]

STORE: user preferences, project decisions, architecture choices, environment setup,
reusable patterns/lessons, tool configurations, naming conventions, API keys/endpoints (by name not value).
SKIP (do not remember): one-time confirmations (「測試成功」「確認收到」「已完成」),
transient process status, trivial acknowledgments, facts that only matter for the current session,
information already captured in code/commits, and anything the user can re-derive in <30 seconds.
Rule of thumb: if this fact won't help you in a NEW session 2 weeks from now, don't store it.
[End remember guidelines]

[Decision rationale format]
When remembering a significant decision (architecture choice, tool selection, design tradeoff),
use the format: 「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」or in English:
"Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)". This preserves the WHY, not just the WHAT.
Examples:
- 因為 ACP 不支援 agent→host RPC 所以選 text token signaling（排除 custom MCP 因為需要改 CLI）
- Chose SQLite for memory because single-file + no daemon (rejected Redis because overkill for single-user)
[End decision rationale format]

[Reflexion policy — structured self-correction]
When the same approach fails ≥2 times consecutively (same tool error, same strategy rejected):
1. STOP — do not retry the same thing a third time.
2. Diagnose in 1-2 sentences: what failed, why, what assumption was wrong.
3. Switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool, different strategy, ask user).
This applies to: tool calls returning errors, strReplace not matching, shell commands failing,
build errors after attempted fixes, and any repeated unsuccessful pattern.
[End reflexion policy]

[Context budget discipline]
Context window is finite. Before starting a research-heavy task:
1. Estimate: will this need >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls? If yes → delegate to researcher specialist or use concise strategies.
2. Prefer: search snippets > full page fetch; summarized results > raw dumps; existing knowledge > re-research.
3. When bridge injects ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING, immediately: stop research, use what you have, produce output.
4. For HTML/report generation: gather conclusions FIRST (≤3 searches), then write file in ONE call. Never interleave 10+ fetches with writing.
[End context budget discipline]

[ASK button discipline]
When your response presents options for the user to choose between:
1. 2+ distinct alternatives → MUST use <<ASK:...>> (no exceptions).
2. Yes/No confirmation → use ASK with two buttons.
3. 「要不要做 X？」→ use ASK (yes/no).
Trigger keywords in your own output: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「你覺得」「which」「option」「prefer」.
If you catch yourself listing options without ASK, STOP and append the token before finishing.
[End ASK button discipline]

[Gap analysis — knowledge honesty]
When answering a question that relies on memory (facts, wiki, or past context):
1. State what you found and where (which topic shard, which wiki page).
2. Explicitly note gaps: information that might be outdated (>30 days old),
   topics where the brain has no facts, or claims you cannot verify from memory.
3. If a fact has no timestamp or is >60 days old, flag it: 「此資訊可能已過時」.
4. Never present absence of information as certainty. Say 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」
   rather than implying something doesn't exist.
This does NOT apply to: code questions, general knowledge, or tasks where
memory is not the primary source. Only when the user asks about something
that should be in the brain (people, decisions, project history, preferences).
[End gap analysis]

[Capability gap detection]
When you notice a task requires a capability you lack or handle clumsily (e.g. repeated
multi-step shell workarounds, manual data transforms that a script could automate, or
a pattern you keep re-implementing from scratch), consider proposing a new tool:
1. If a reusable script (Python/shell) in scripts/ would solve it → write it, test it,
   then ask the user to confirm with <<ASK:...>> before officially adding it.
2. If it's a broader pattern worth a skill → emit <<SKILL_PROPOSE:tool-name|reason>>.
3. If scripts/ already has a relevant tool → use it (check [Available scripts] section).
Do NOT propose tools for one-off tasks. Only propose when the pattern has appeared ≥2 times
or is clearly going to recur.
IMPORTANT: Never silently add a tool to the toolbox. After writing and testing a script,
you MUST ask the user with <<ASK:...>> before considering it officially available.
If the user declines, delete the script.
[End capability gap detection]

<<ASK:preamble_trim|tail=縮 facts tail|guide=壓縮 guidelines|both=*1+2 都做|wiki=瘦身 wiki 索引|keep=維持現狀>>
兩項都做。這是動 preamble 的改動，先讀 policy 和現場。

# Preamble Frozen-Snapshot Policy

**Audience**: anyone editing `src/sessionManager.ts`, `src/memory.ts`,
or anything in the path that feeds Kiro / Codex / Claude's first prompt.
**Status**: enforced invariant, not an aspiration.
**Inspired by**: Hermes Agent (NousResearch) — same rationale, different
plumbing.

## The invariant

The bridge preamble (tool notes + env block + memory block) is built
**once per ACP session** at session creation time. It is **never** rebuilt
while a session is live.

Concretely:

- `sessionManager.create()` calls `buildPreambleWithBreakdown(facts, userId)`
  exactly once and freezes the result into `session.memoryPreamble` +
  `session.preambleBreakdown`.
- `sessionManager.get()` returns the existing `ChatSession` object
  untouched when the session is still open (`!client.isClosed`). No
  re-read of the facts file, no re-measurement.
- `session.preambleInjected` is a latch: preamble text is included in
  the **first** `client.prompt()` call for that session and never again.
  Subsequent user turns send only the user text.

The preamble is only rebuilt when a **new session** is created, which
happens in these four paths and no others:

1. `get()` sees `existing.client.isClosed` → falls through to `create()`.
2. Session is idle past `config.sessionIdleMs` → `sweepIdle()` drops it
   and the next `get()` rebuilds.
3. Agent process crashes / exits unexpectedly → `exit` handler deletes
   the session from the map; next `get()` rebuilds.
4. User issues `/restart` or `/drop`, or the bridge shuts down and
   restarts.

## Why

The Kiro / Codex / Claude ACP agents cache their system-prompt prefix
aggressively at the LLM provider layer (Anthropic / OpenAI prompt
caching, 5-minute TTL on most tiers). If the bridge were to rebuild
preamble mid-session and re-send it, **every user turn would invalidate
the prefix cache**. For a 3–5 KB preamble that is re-hit 50 times in a
long session, that's the difference between `~0 input-token cost for
cached content` and `full input-token cost × 50`. It can turn a cheap
chat into an expensive one by 1–2 orders of magnitude on the cacheable
portion.

This is the same reason Hermes Agent's docs hammer the point (see their
`prompt-assembly.md` and the `# Prompt Caching Must Not Break` policy
in their AGENTS.md): **the only time we alter the cached prefix is when
we're already throwing the cache away** (i.e. starting a new session).

## Forbidden mid-session operations

Do **not** add code that:

- Calls `buildPreamble*()` after `create()` has returned.
- Mutates `session.memoryPreamble` / `session.preambleBreakdown` in place.
- Re-reads `facts-<userId>.md` on every turn to "keep memory fresh".
- Reloads `topics.json` / `notebooklm-routing.json` and re-injects them
  into the live preamble.
- Hot-reloads SKILL.md contents into the system prompt.
- Resets `session.preambleInjected = false` to "re-inject" newer context.

If you think you need any of the above, you almost certainly want a new
session instead — drop the old one (`session.client.close()` and
`this.sessions.delete(chatId)`) so the next `get()` rebuilds. That's
the right way to invalidate cache.

## Allowed mid-session operations

These are fine because they don't touch the cached prefix:

- Writing to disk: `remember()` / `forget()` / scheduler state / queued
  messages / history → all legitimate, all mid-session-safe.
- Updating ephemeral state on the `ChatSession` object that is not part
  of the preamble: `buffer`, `toolLog`, `charsIn/Out`, `usage`,
  `stderrTail`, `inflight`, `lastUsed`.
- Appending content to the **current user turn** via tool outputs or
  MCP responses. Those are post-prefix, not cached.
- Scheduler-triggered commands (`/memorytoskill`, `/topicreview`, etc.)
  — these open their own ephemeral ACP client and never touch the
  live user session.

## Practical consequence for memory writes

When the agent (or the bridge, on the user's behalf) calls `remember()`
mid-session:

1. The fact is appended to `facts-<userId>.md` **immediately**.
2. The topic shard at `facts_Topic/<userId>/<topic>.md` is updated
   **immediately**.
3. The live preamble is **not** updated.
4. The agent will see the new fact next time the session is rebuilt —
   i.e. after `/restart`, or after `sessionIdleMs` elapses, or after a
   manual `/drop`.

This is **by design**, not a bug. Document any user-facing "I'll
remember that for next time" phrasing accordingly.

## If you really need mid-session awareness

The correct escape hatches, in order of preference:

1. **Tool response**: let the agent call an MCP tool (e.g. `list_facts`)
   to query the live state. Tool responses are not cached and always
   see disk.
2. **Next-turn user message**: queue a synthetic next-turn message like
   "Note: just added to memory: …" — this appends after the cached
   prefix and is fine.
3. **End the session**: if the change is significant enough to need to
   be in the prefix, `/restart` is cheap and correct.

What you **must not** do is rebuild the preamble silently. That breaks
the invariant this document exists to protect.

## Change-this-policy checklist

Before any PR that touches `buildPreamble*`, `memoryPreamble`,
`preambleInjected`, or the `SessionManager.create()` codepath:

- [ ] Confirm the change does not cause preamble to be re-emitted on any
  turn other than the first of a new session.
- [ ] Grep for any new caller of `buildPreamble*()` outside
  `sessionManager.ts` — if there is one, it's suspect.
- [ ] If the change rebuilds sessions more often (e.g. lowers
  `sessionIdleMs`, adds a reason for reset), explicitly justify it
  against the prompt-cache cost.
- [ ] If you remove or weaken `preambleInjected` latch semantics,
  replace this document with an up-to-date one (or delete it and amend
  `AGENTS.md`).

## Related

- `src/sessionManager.ts` — `create()` is the canonical build point.
- `src/memory.ts` — `buildPreambleWithBreakdown()` is the only preamble
  builder.
- `.kiro/steering/windows-shell-safety.md` — sibling steering doc.
- Hermes Agent docs, `developer-guide/prompt-assembly.md` — external
  reference for the same pattern in a different codebase.

# 啟動 ACP agent 的指令，空白切 args。預設假設 kiro-cli 已在 PATH。
# 範例：
#   kiro-cli acp --model claude-opus-4.6 -a    						← Kiro（預設）

#   claude-agent-acp    											← claude
# 任何新 adapter 上線前可用 `npm run check-acp -- <command>` 驗 handshake。
ACP_AGENT_COMMAND=claude-agent-acp

# claude 用 ------------------------------------------------------------------------
# model / effort 由 bridge 在 session/new 後透過 ACP session/set_config_option pin
# （claude-agent-acp 的 CLI --model/--effort flag 在 ACP 模式無效，見 ms / docs/SPEC-acp-model-effort-pin.md）。
# claude-fable-5 , claude-opus-4.6 , claude-sonnet-5
ACP_MODEL=claude-fable-5
ACP_EFFORT=medium
#----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 選填：傳給 kiro-cli 的 --agent 參數，指定某個 agent profile（載入它的 tools/skills）。
# 其他 ACP adapter（codex-acp / gemini）不吃這個 flag，留空即可。
# 範例：writing
ACP_AGENT_NAME=

# ACP session 的 working directory 絕對路徑；agent 能讀寫此目錄下的檔案。
# 留空會用 bridge 自己所在的資料夾。
ACP_SESSION_CWD=

# 選填：用逗號分隔的 Telegram user ID 白名單；未列入名單的使用者會被 bot 靜默忽略。
# 留空代表「任何人都可用」（公開 bot 請務必填好）。
ALLOWED_USER_IDS=509424983

# ACP session 閒置多久後自動關掉（分鐘）。
SESSION_IDLE_MINUTES=9000

# 模型的 context window（tokens），用來計算 /context 顯示的使用率百分比。
# 預設 200000（Claude Sonnet 4.5 / Kiro 預設值）；換 agent 若 context 不同自行調整。
CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=200000


# 除了 ACP_SESSION_CWD 之外，還允許 bridge 自動把這些根目錄下的檔案
# 以 Telegram file 回傳（當 agent 在回覆裡寫出絕對路徑時）。
# 路徑分隔符：Windows 用 ";"、POSIX 用 ":"。
# 範例（Windows）：
#   TG_SEND_ROOTS=F:\AI\AIResource;F:\AI\AIMemory
TG_SEND_ROOTS=C:\;D:\;G:\

# 長期記憶資料夾（放 per-user facts-<id>.md 與 /save 匯出檔）。
# 預設：F:\AI\AIMemory。不同機器建議各自獨立，例如 F:\AI_Codex\AIMemory。
MEMORY_DIR=G:\AI\AIMemory

# Session 關閉時等 agent 萃取事實回覆的上限（毫秒）——超時就把 transcript 排入
# pending queue，下次 bridge 啟動再補跑。保險絲性質，正常情況遠短於此值。
# 預設：180000（3 分鐘）。
MEMORY_EXTRACT_TIMEOUT_MS=180000

# 當 agent 回報可重試的暫時性後端錯誤（例如 AWS Bedrock 中途 "dispatch failure"）

ACP_PROMPT_RETRIES=2

# 第一次重試前的 backoff 起始值（毫秒），每次重試翻倍：1000ms → 2000ms → 4000ms。
# 預設：1000。
ACP_PROMPT_RETRY_BASE_MS=1000

# streaming 過程中每次更新 Telegram 訊息的最小間隔（毫秒）。
# 愈大愈不容易被 Telegram 429 限流，但 streaming 看起來愈不流暢。
# 最低 500，預設 1200；如果常被 429 打到可以調到 2000–2500。
STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS=1200

# grammY autoRetry 遇到 Telegram 429 時最多願意等的秒數。
# Telegram 對重複觸發的 bot 會把 retry_after 階梯式拉高到 60–120s，
# 預設 60 夠應付大多數狀況；若 log 看到 "failed 429: retry after N" 且 N 在

TG_AUTORETRY_MAX_DELAY_SECONDS=60


# /backup 指令用的 git 工作樹（會把 AIMemory + agent 設定目錄鏡像進去並推到 origin）。

# /backup 推送的 git branch。預設 main。
BACKUP_BRANCH=master

# backup repo 底下用來存 agent 設定的子目錄名。預設依 ACP_AGENT_COMMAND
# 自動偵測：含 "kiro" → kiro、含 "codex" → codex、含 "claude" → claude。
# 設定檔結構會長這樣：<BACKUP_REPO_DIR>/<BACKUP_AGENT_DIR_NAME>/{agents,settings,steering,powers,skills}
# 只有當多台機器（Kiro + Codex）要 push 到同一個 backup repo 且想保留

BACKUP_AGENT_DIR_NAME=


# 每次新 session 開場時，直接內嵌進 preamble 的「最新 N 條事實」數量。

MEMORY_PREAMBLE_TAIL=30

# preamble 要不要在「最新 N 條事實」之後附「較舊事實的 topic 索引」。
# 1/true/yes 開啟，其他關閉。預設開啟。
# 若目前 agent 沒載 MCP（例如 codex-acp）可設 0 省 token，因為 agent 也無從查 shard。
MEMORY_PREAMBLE_TOPICS=1

# topics.json 最多允許幾個 topic（由 apply_topics MCP tool 在寫入時強制）。
# 預設 50；facts 量很大、50 個 topic 不夠用時才調高。
# facts-store.ts 有寫死 200 的絕對上限以防 agent 誤提超大清單。
MEMORY_MAX_TOPICS=50

# /goal 的預設 turn budget — agent 回覆未帶 <<GOAL_DONE>> 時 bridge 自動塞
# continuation 的最大次數。達到後 goal 轉 paused，由 /goal resume 續跑。
# 範圍 1-50（超出自動 clamp），無效值 fallback 5。
# Per-goal 覆寫：`/goal 10 <objective>` 這樣在指令開頭放 1-50 的整數就會
# 蓋掉這個預設值；N 超範圍或非數字會回退到這裡。
# 小任務（寫檔/改字）留 5 夠用；大型迭代任務（修完 tsc、跑到 test 全過）
# 想給多一點可調到 10-20。設太高唯一風險是 agent 誤判沒完成時多燒幾輪 —
# 達成即 done，剩餘 budget 不會被用掉。
#
# 啟動提示：`/goal <objective>` 與 `/goal resume` 回覆會帶一個 ▶️ 開始
# inline button — 點一下會立刻發動第一個 continuation turn，不用再手動
# 打一句話。也可以照舊直接發訊息啟動 loop，效果相同。
GOAL_DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS=5

# Topic 分類規則檔（見 src/topic-rules.ts）。留空時 bridge 會用
# <MEMORY_DIR>/topics.json（預設 F:\AI\AIMemory\topics.json）。
# 檔案不存在時會從內建預設自動建立，也會被 /backup 自動收進去。
# 可自由編輯，bridge 大約每 2 秒重讀一次，不用 /restart。
# 檔案被刪或格式壞掉時會 fallback 到內建預設。
TOPICS_FILE=

# ─── 群組模式 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 群組中 bot 之間連續對話的最大輪數。超過後暫停回應，人類發話時重置。
# 防止兩個 bot 互相 mention 造成無限乒乓。預設 5。
GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS=5


# ─── Bot-to-Bot Relay（透過 Upstash Redis 中繼 + Telegram bot-to-bot） ──────
# 傳輸模式："redis"（僅 Redis）、"telegram"（僅 Telegram bot-to-bot）、"both"（telegram 優先，redis fallback）
RELAY_TRANSPORT=redis

# Telegram bot-to-bot 模式需要：對方 bot 的 @username（含 @）
# 雙方都需在 BotFather 啟用 "Bot to Bot Communication Mode"
RELAY_TARGET_BOT_USERNAME=

# Upstash Redis REST API 連線資訊（免費方案：10k req/day）
# transport=telegram 時可留空
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL=
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN=

# Relay 訊息同步貼到哪個群組（讓人類看到 bot 之間的對話）
RELAY_GROUP_CHAT_ID=

# 本 bot 在 relay 中的顯示名稱（對方收到時會看到「來自 <name>」）
RELAY_BOT_NAME=

# 空轉防治：連續幾次 relay-only turn 後停止注入（人類發話重置）
# RELAY_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_TURNS=10

# Minutes to suppress new injections from the same relay peer after
# <<RELAY_DONE>> or RELAY_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_TURNS trips.


# ─── Local LLM (llama.cpp) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# llama.cpp server URL。設定後 enrichment（prefilter/rerank/classify）會用本地模型。
# 留空代表不用本地 LLM（所有 enrichment graceful skip）。
LLAMACPP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080

# Bridge 啟動時自動開 llama.cpp server 的腳本路徑。留空代表不自動開（需手動）。
# 範例：F:\AI\llama-cpp\start-server.bat
LLAMACPP_START_CMD=

# ─── Desktop Pet ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 啟用桌面寵物 WebSocket server（推送 agent 狀態到 pet app）。
# pet app 連 ws://127.0.0.1:PET_PORT 接收事件。
PET_ENABLED=false

# Pet WebSocket server 監聽的 port。預設 38470。
PET_PORT=38470



# ─── RTK (Rust Token Killer) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 啟用後 preamble 會指示 agent 在 shell 指令前加 `rtk` 前綴，壓縮輸出省 token。
# 啟動時自動偵測 rtk binary 是否在 PATH，找不到會自動 disable。
# 安裝：https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk
RTK_SHELL_REWRITE=0

# Telegram Bot 的 token（從 @BotFather 拿）
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=

# 啟動 ACP agent 的指令，空白切 args。預設假設 kiro-cli 已在 PATH。
# 範例：
#   kiro-cli acp --model claude-opus-4.6 -a    						← Kiro（預設）
#   codex-acp                                  						← Codex（需先 npm i -g @zed-industries/codex-acp）
#   codex-acp -c model=gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort=medium     ← Codex 指定 model
#   gemini --experimental-acp                  						← Gemini CLI（flag 請以該 CLI 最新文件為準）
#   claude-agent-acp    											← claude
# 任何新 adapter 上線前可用 `npm run check-acp -- <command>` 驗 handshake。
ACP_AGENT_COMMAND=kiro-cli acp

# claude 用 ------------------------------------------------------------------------
# model / effort 由 bridge 在 session/new 後透過 ACP session/set_config_option pin
# （claude-agent-acp 的 CLI --model/--effort flag 在 ACP 模式無效，見 ms / docs/SPEC-acp-model-effort-pin.md）。
# claude-fable-5 , claude-opus-4.6 , claude-sonnet-5
ACP_MODEL=claude-fable-5
ACP_EFFORT=medium
#----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 選填：傳給 kiro-cli 的 --agent 參數，指定某個 agent profile（載入它的 tools/skills）。
# 其他 ACP adapter（codex-acp / gemini）不吃這個 flag，留空即可。
# 範例：writing
ACP_AGENT_NAME=

# 選填：在 session/new 之後，由 bridge 透過 ACP `session/set_config_option`
# 幫這個 session pin model / reasoning effort。這是設 claude-agent-acp model/effort
# 的**唯一可靠方式**——它的 CLI `--model` / `--effort` flag 在 ACP server 模式會被無視。
# 留空 = 沿用 agent 自己的預設（~/.claude/settings.json 的 model / effortLevel 或
# ANTHROPIC_MODEL）。ACP_MODEL 接受模糊別名（"fable-5" / "claude-fable-5"）；
# ACP_EFFORT 必須精確符合該 model 支援的值（low / medium / high）。
# Kiro / Codex 等非 Claude adapter 會忽略這兩個（收到會 reject，bridge log 後續跑）。
# 範例：ACP_MODEL=claude-fable-5   ACP_EFFORT=medium
ACP_MODEL=
ACP_EFFORT=

# ACP session 的 working directory 絕對路徑；agent 能讀寫此目錄下的檔案。
# 留空會用 bridge 自己所在的資料夾。
ACP_SESSION_CWD=

# 選填：用逗號分隔的 Telegram user ID 白名單；未列入名單的使用者會被 bot 靜默忽略。
# 留空代表「任何人都可用」（公開 bot 請務必填好）。
ALLOWED_USER_IDS=

# ACP session 閒置多久後自動關掉（分鐘）。
SESSION_IDLE_MINUTES=900

# 模型的 context window（tokens），用來計算 /context 顯示的使用率百分比。
# 預設 200000（Claude Sonnet 4.5 / Kiro 預設值）；換 agent 若 context 不同自行調整。
CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=200000


# 除了 ACP_SESSION_CWD 之外，還允許 bridge 自動把這些根目錄下的檔案
# 以 Telegram file 回傳（當 agent 在回覆裡寫出絕對路徑時）。
# 路徑分隔符：Windows 用 ";"、POSIX 用 ":"。
# 範例（Windows）：
#   TG_SEND_ROOTS=F:\AI\AIResource;F:\AI\AIMemory
TG_SEND_ROOTS=

# 長期記憶資料夾（放 per-user facts-<id>.md 與 /save 匯出檔）。
# 預設：F:\AI\AIMemory。不同機器建議各自獨立，例如 F:\AI_Codex\AIMemory。
MEMORY_DIR=

# Session 關閉時等 agent 萃取事實回覆的上限（毫秒）——超時就把 transcript 排入
# pending queue，下次 bridge 啟動再補跑。保險絲性質，正常情況遠短於此值。
# 預設：180000（3 分鐘）。
MEMORY_EXTRACT_TIMEOUT_MS=180000

# 當 agent 回報可重試的暫時性後端錯誤（例如 AWS Bedrock 中途 "dispatch failure"）
# 時，prompt() 自動重試的次數。0 代表不重試。預設 2（同一個 prompt 最多跑 3 次）。
ACP_PROMPT_RETRIES=2

# 第一次重試前的 backoff 起始值（毫秒），每次重試翻倍：1000ms → 2000ms → 4000ms。
# 預設：1000。
ACP_PROMPT_RETRY_BASE_MS=1000

# streaming 過程中每次更新 Telegram 訊息的最小間隔（毫秒）。
# 愈大愈不容易被 Telegram 429 限流，但 streaming 看起來愈不流暢。
# 最低 500，預設 1200；如果常被 429 打到可以調到 2000–2500。
STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS=1200

# grammY autoRetry 遇到 Telegram 429 時最多願意等的秒數。
# Telegram 對重複觸發的 bot 會把 retry_after 階梯式拉高到 60–120s，
# 預設 60 夠應付大多數狀況；若 log 看到 "failed 429: retry after N" 且 N 在
# 60–120 之間才需要加大。最低 5，預設 60。
TG_AUTORETRY_MAX_DELAY_SECONDS=60

# ─── Daily Intel Podcast → YouTube ──────────────────────────────────────────
# 預設關閉。開啟後，每份有內容的新 Daily Intel 報告會非同步建立 NotebookLM
# Audio Overview、轉成 MP4、以 unlisted 上傳 YouTube 並加入 Podcast playlist。
INTEL_PODCAST_ENABLED=0

# 專用 NotebookLM notebook ID。建議只放 Daily Intel 報告。
INTEL_PODCAST_NOTEBOOK_ID=

# NotebookLM MCP stdio server。Windows 全域安裝預設通常可直接使用下列值。
INTEL_PODCAST_MCP_COMMAND=notebooklm-mcp-server.cmd
INTEL_PODCAST_MCP_ARGS=server
# Media download uses ~/.notebooklm-mcp/auth.json. Run: npm run auth:notebooklm-media

# 暫存音訊與 MP4；必須位於 MEMORY_DIR 外，成功後立即刪除，失敗最多保留 24 小時。
INTEL_PODCAST_TEMP_DIR=output/tmp/daily-intel-podcast

# FFmpeg executable 與固定封面。封面建議 1280x720 PNG/JPG。
# 留空時使用 ffmpeg-static 與 repo 內建 assets/daily-intel/podcast-cover.png。
INTEL_PODCAST_FFMPEG_PATH=
INTEL_PODCAST_COVER_FILE=
INTEL_PODCAST_POLL_MS=60000

# Google OAuth client 必須授權 https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube.upload
# 及管理 playlist 所需的 YouTube scope。影片固定先上傳為 unlisted。
YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID=
YOUTUBE_CLIENT_SECRET=
YOUTUBE_REFRESH_TOKEN=
YOUTUBE_PODCAST_PLAYLIST_ID=

# Google Docs / Drive OAuth。第一次執行：
#   npm run google:auth -- C:\path\to\desktop-oauth-client.json
# 指令只輸出授權網址，不會自動開瀏覽器；請貼到正確的 Google Profile。
# 授權完成後，程式會把以下三項寫入 .env；日後不需要保留 JSON 路徑。

GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLIENT_ID=
GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_CLIENT_SECRET=
GOOGLE_WORKSPACE_REFRESH_TOKEN=

# Google Maps Platform 使用獨立 API Key，不使用上述 OAuth refresh token。
# 在 Cloud Console 將 Key 限制為 Places API (New)、Routes API、Geocoding API。
GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY=


# /backup 指令用的 git 工作樹（會把 AIMemory + agent 設定目錄鏡像進去並推到 origin）。
# 留空代表停用 /backup。該資料夾必須已經是有 "origin" remote 的 git repo，

BACKUP_REPO_DIR=

BACKUP_BRANCH=main

GOAL_DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS=5

# Topic 分類規則檔（見 src/topic-rules.ts）。留空時 bridge 會用

input.old_string:
block +=
    "[Remember guidelines — what to store vs. skip]
" +
    "STORE: user preferences, project decisions, architecture choices, environment setup,
" +
    "reusable patterns/lessons, tool configurations, naming conventions, API keys/endpoints (by name not value).
" +
    "SKIP (do not remember): one-time confirmations (「測試成功」「確認收到」「已完成」),
" +
    "transient process status, trivial acknowledgments, facts that only matter for the current session,
" +
    "information already captured in code/commits, and anything the user can re-derive in <30 seconds.
" +
    "Rule of thumb: if this fact won't help you in a NEW session 2 weeks from now, don't store it.
" +
    "[End remember guidelines]

" +
    "[Decision rationale format]
" +
    "When remembering a significant decision (architecture choice, tool selection, design tradeoff),
" +
    "use the format: 「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」or in English:
" +
    ""Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)". This preserves the WHY, not just the WHAT.
" +
    "Examples:
" +
    "- 因為 ACP 不支援 agent→host RPC 所以選 text token signaling（排除 custom MCP 因為需要改 CLI）
" +
    "- Chose SQLite for memory because single-file + no daemon (rejected Redis because overkill for single-user)
" +
    "[End decision rationale format]

" +
    "[Reflexion policy — structured self-correction]
" +
    "When the same approach fails ≥2 times consecutively (same tool error, same strategy rejected):
" +
    "1. STOP — do not retry the same thing a third time.
" +
    "2. Diagnose in 1-2 sentences: what failed, why, what assumption was wrong.
" +
    "3. Switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool, different strategy, ask user).
" +
    "This applies to: tool calls returning errors, strReplace not matching, shell commands failing,
" +
    "build errors after attempted fixes, and any repeated unsuccessful pattern.
" +
    "[End reflexion policy]

" +
    "[Context budget discipline]
" +
    "Context window is finite. Before starting a research-heavy task:
" +
    "1. Estimate: will this need >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls? If yes → delegate to researcher specialist or use concise strategies.
" +
    "2. Prefer: search snippets > full page fetch; summarized results > raw dumps; existing knowledge > re-research.
" +
    "3. When bridge injects ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING, immediately: stop research, use what you have, produce output.
" +
    "4. For HTML/report generation: gather conclusions FIRST (≤3 searches), then write file in ONE call. Never interleave 10+ fetches with writing.
" +
    "[End context budget discipline]

" +
    "[ASK button discipline]
" +
    "When your response presents options for the user to choose between:
" +
    "1. 2+ distinct alternatives → MUST use <<ASK:...>> (no exceptions).
" +
    "2. Yes/No confirmation → use ASK with two buttons.
" +
    "3. 「要不要做 X？」→ use ASK (yes/no).
" +
    "Trigger keywords in your own output: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「你覺得」「which」「option」「prefer」.
" +
    "If you catch yourself listing options without ASK, STOP and append the token before finishing.
" +
    "[End ASK button discipline]

" +
    "[Gap analysis — knowledge honesty]
" +
    "When answering a question that relies on memory (facts, wiki, or past context):
" +
    "1. State what you found and where (which topic shard, which wiki page).
" +
    "2. Explicitly note gaps: information that might be outdated (>30 days old),
" +
    "   topics where the brain has no facts, or claims you cannot verify from memory.
" +
    "3. If a fact has no timestamp or is >60 days old, flag it: 「此資訊可能已過時」.
" +
    "4. Never present absence of information as certainty. Say 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」
" +
    "   rather than implying something doesn't exist.
" +
    "This does NOT apply to: code questions, general knowledge, or tasks where
" +
    "memory is not the primary source. Only when the user asks about something
" +
    "that should be in the brain (people, decisions, project history, preferences).
" +
    "[End gap analysis]

" +
    "[Capability gap detection]
" +
    "When you notice a task requires a capability you lack or handle clumsily (e.g. repeated
" +
    "multi-step shell workarounds, manual data transforms that a script could automate, or
" +
    "a pattern you keep re-implementing from scratch), consider proposing a new tool:
" +
    "1. If a reusable script (Python/shell) in scripts/ would solve it → write it, test it,
" +
    "   then ask the user to confirm with <<ASK:...>> before officially adding it.
" +
    "2. If it's a broader pattern worth a skill → emit <<SKILL_PROPOSE:tool-name|reason>>.
" +
    "3. If scripts/ already has a relevant tool → use it (check [Available scripts] section).
" +
    "Do NOT propose tools for one-off tasks. Only propose when the pattern has appeared ≥2 times
" +
    "or is clearly going to recur.
" +
    "IMPORTANT: Never silently add a tool to the toolbox. After writing and testing a script,
" +
    "you MUST ask the user with <<ASK:...>> before considering it officially available.
" +
    "If the user declines, delete the script.
" +
    "[End capability gap detection]

";

    "REFLEXION — same approach fails ≥2 times (tool error, no-match edit, failing build) → STOP, diagnose in 1-2\n" +
    "sentences, switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool/strategy, or ask user). Never retry a 3rd time.\n" +
    "CONTEXT BUDGET — research-heavy task needing >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls → delegate to researcher or go concise.\n" +
    "Prefer snippets/summaries over full fetches. On ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING: stop research, produce output now.\n" +
    "Reports: gather conclusions first (≤3 searches), then write the file in ONE call.\n" +
    "ASK BUTTONS — presenting 2+ alternatives, yes/no confirmation, or 「要不要做 X？」→ MUST append <<ASK:...>>.\n" +
    "Self-check triggers: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「which」「prefer」. Options listed without ASK → add the token before finishing.\n" +
    "MEMORY HONESTY — memory-based answers: say where you found it (topic shard / wiki page); facts >60 days old\n" +
    "→ 「此資訊可能已過時」; absence of records → 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」, never assert non-existence.\n" +
    "Applies only to brain questions (people/decisions/history/preferences), not code or general knowledge.\n" +
    "CAPABILITY GAPS — clumsy pattern recurs ≥2 times → write+test a script in scripts/, then confirm via <<ASK:...>>\n" +
    "before adopting (declined → delete); broader patterns → <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>. Check [Available scripts]\n" +
    "first. Never silently add tools; never propose for one-offs.\n" +
    "[End agent disciplines]\n\n";
